baseline_description: BLOSUM62-encoded peptide (9x20) concatenated with BLOSUM62-encoded HLA pseudo-sequence (34x20), 2-layer MLP (256, 128) with ReLU and dropout, trained with Adam on MSE for 12 epochs at batch 1024. Mean Spearman across 3 seeds.
source_dataset: MHCflurry data_curated.20231023 (curated_training_data.affinity.csv) derived from IEDB; HLA pseudo-sequences from MHCflurry class1_pseudosequences.csv (NetMHCpan convention).
